description: Comprehensive Kafka consumer lag and health monitoring for Klag (https://github.com/themoah/klag). Lag, velocity, hot partitions, time-based lag, data-loss-prevention and JVM runtime metrics. Requires a Prometheus-compatible data source.

panels.title: Consumer Group State Changes
panels.description: Shows cumulative state changes over time. Spikes indicate state transitions (rebalances, failures).

panels.title: Time Lag by Consumer Group
panels.description: Lag in milliseconds based on Kafka message timestamps

panels.title: Time to Close Lag (Catching Up Only)
panels.description: Estimated seconds until lag reaches zero (only shown when consumer is catching up)

panels.title: Retention Percent by Consumer Group
panels.description: Percentage of topic retention consumed by consumer lag. High values indicate risk of data loss.

panels.title: At Risk Topics (>50% Retention Used)
panels.description: Topics where consumer lag exceeds 50% of retention period. These are at risk of data loss.

panels.title: Hot Partition Throughput Over Time
panels.description: Partitions with disproportionately high throughput (messages/second). Value is throughput × 100 for precision.

title: Klag - Kafka Lag Monitoring
